Neuchâtel Casino: Staff, Languages, Currency, Payments and Winnings

At Neuchâtel Casino, we welcome every guest with professional service, clear guidance and a calm, confident gaming atmosphere. Our team assists visitors at the entrance, during identity control, at reception, on the gaming floor, at the bar, in the restaurant area and at the cash desk. Our croupiers and floor staff help guests understand Roulette Anglaise, Black Jack, Ultimate Texas Hold’em Poker, video poker, slot machines and electronic roulette. We pay special attention to first-time visitors, because a casino evening becomes more enjoyable when the rules, chips, tickets and payout process are easy to understand. French is the main language of communication in our casino, and our team also aims to assist guests in English and German whenever needed.

The main currency at Neuchâtel Casino is CHF, which is used for chips, slot play, tickets and payouts. At the tables, guests buy chips and receive winnings according to the rules of the selected game. On slot machines, credits and tickets make it easy to continue playing, move between machines or request a payout through the available casino procedures. In the restaurant and bar, guests can use familiar payment formats according to the conditions in place. For card payments, cash desk services, limits, exchange options and specific payment questions, our reception or cashier team will guide guests to the most suitable solution.

ATMs and currency exchange are best planned around the use of CHF, because all gaming operations in our casino are based on the local cash and chip system. Guests who need cash or foreign currency support can ask our team for current cash desk information and nearby options. We recommend preparing CHF before the gaming session so that the evening remains smooth, relaxed and uninterrupted. Chips, tickets, cashier operations and jackpot procedures are handled according to our security and compliance rules. This allows us to keep every transaction clear, reliable and comfortable for our guests.

The payout process depends on the game format. Table game winnings are paid according to the relevant rules of Roulette, Black Jack or Ultimate Texas Hold’em Poker, while slot machine credits and tickets are handled through the cash desk or available payout procedures. Jackpot winnings and larger payouts may require additional checks, identification and secure processing. Winnings from licensed land-based casino games are generally paid without tax withholding for regular guests. Guests with specific personal tax circumstances remain responsible for their own declarations, while our role is to provide a correct, secure and transparent payout experience at Neuchâtel Casino.
